message:
fix(pool): prevent resource leak into idle queue of closed pool

Move total_created increment before the closed-pool check, and
early-return (dropping the new resource) when the pool is already
closed. Previously, resources created after pool closure were pushed
into the idle queue where they would never be drained, causing a
slow memory/connection leak.

The fix order is:
1. Decrement creating counter
2. Increment total_created (for accurate stats regardless of disposal)
3. Check state.closed → drop resource and return early
4. Otherwise push into idle queue as before

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
